author: anon-13168fa2
content: Expanded the cargo publish section in 03-real-world-skills/05-shipping-it.md with the full 8-step walkthrough: crates.io account via GitHub OAuth, email verification gotcha, API token generation, cargo login to ~/.cargo/credentials.toml, Cargo.toml metadata fields with a real example, cargo publish --dry-run with common warnings, cargo publish, git tag. Added explicit 'Publishing is optional' callout at the top and 'cannot unpublish, only yank' warning with the yank command semantics. Added a follow-up versions subsection for the ongoing loop.
